deleteAccountWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
deleteCondition1: Your personal information, profile, and activity history will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
deleteCondition2: For certificate verification purposes, only your name will be retained.
deleteCondition3: You will lose access to all features and services; any subscriptions or memberships may be terminated.
deleteCondition4: If you use Single Sign-On (SSO), signing in again will create a new account with no historical data.
deleteCondition5: Any content or resources you created will remain accessible to other users. You will lose management rights over them.
deleteCondition6: Usage reports will retain location data you declared.
deleteCondition7: Please back up important data and download your certificates before confirming deletion.
deleteAccountConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This cannot be undone.
deleteAccountSuccess: Your account has been deleted successfully.
deleteAccountFailed: Account deletion failed. Please try again.
deleteAccountOtpInstructions_email: An OTP has been sent to your registered email. Enter it below to confirm deletion.
deleteAccountOtpInstructions_phone: An OTP has been sent to your registered mobile number. Enter it below to confirm deletion.
deleteAccountNoContact: No email or phone number on record. Cannot send OTP.
deleteAccountEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
deleteAccountEmailMismatch: This email does not match your account.
deleteAccountEmailCheckFailed: Could not verify the email. Please try again.
acceptAllConditions: Please accept all conditions to proceed.
deleteAccountOffline: You need an internet connection to delete your account.
deleteAccountOtpOffline: You're offline. Reconnect and try again — your OTP is still valid.
deleteAccountResendOffline: You're offline. Reconnect to resend the OTP.
otpGenerateFailed: Failed to send OTP. Please try again.
otpVerifyFailed: OTP verification failed. Please try again.
maxAttemptsReached: Maximum attempts reached. Cannot proceed with deletion.
otpWrong_email: Invalid OTP. Please check the OTP sent to your email.
otpWrong_phone: Invalid OTP. Please check the OTP sent to your mobile number.
recaptchaFailed: Verification check failed. Please try again.
deleteAccountAdminBlocked: Your role does not allow account deletion. Please contact support.
